cards.back: A pattern classification algorithm that classifies a new pattern into a class based on the minimum distance between the new pattern and the class prototypes.
A representative image of a class in pattern classification by prototype matching.
A function used to measure the distance between two images, such as Euclidean distance or Mahalanobis distance.
A function that calculates the distance between two images, such as Euclidean distance or Mahalanobis distance.
The class prototype that is closest to the new pattern in the pattern classification algorithm.
